name: COLONY BANKCORP INC
summary: Colony Bankcorp, Inc. is a Georgia-based bank holding company operating through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Colony Bank, a Georgia state-chartered bank. The company provides commercial banking services including lending, deposit products, and mortgage banking services across Georgia, Alabama, Florida, and neighboring markets. Services include business banking, real estate lending, and mortgage origination.
